description: Citation format templates per style. Phase 6 fills slots only; format string is fixed.

efsa.reference_efsa_conclusion: EFSA (European Food Safety Authority). {year}. Conclusion on the peer review of the pesticide risk assessment of the active substance {substance}. EFSA Journal {year};{volume}({issue}):{article_no}, {pages} pp. https://doi.org/{doi} [accessed {accessed}].
efsa.reference_rar: {rms_country} (Rapporteur Member State). {year}. Renewal Assessment Report on {substance}, Volume {volume}. Prepared for the European Food Safety Authority.
efsa.reference_guideline: OECD. {year}. Test No. {tg_num}: {title}. OECD Guidelines for the Testing of Chemicals, Section {section}. https://doi.org/{doi}

vancouver.reference_efsa_conclusion: {n}. EFSA. Conclusion on the peer review of the pesticide risk assessment of the active substance {substance}. EFSA Journal. {year};{volume}({issue}):{article_no}. doi:{doi}

apa.reference_efsa_conclusion: European Food Safety Authority. ({year}). Conclusion on the peer review of the pesticide risk assessment of the active substance {substance}. EFSA Journal, {volume}({issue}), {article_no}. https://doi.org/{doi}

acs.reference_efsa_conclusion: ({n}) European Food Safety Authority. Conclusion on the peer review of the pesticide risk assessment of the active substance {substance}. EFSA J. {year}, {volume}, {article_no}.

marker_universal.description: Every in-text citation uses [CIT-N] marker in REVIEW.md regardless of final style. Style-formatted reference list is generated from CITATION-LEDGER.md at delivery time. This decouples citation tracking (CIT-N) from format rendering.
